title: Milk Chocolate Fudge

html:
OREO FUDGE

INGREDIENTS

12 Oreo biscuits, roughly broken

1 tin condensed milk

4 x 150g slabs white chocolate

 

METHOD

  1. Put the condensed milk and chocolate into a bowl that's microwave-safe. Melt the chocolate for about one minute in the condensed milk. Stir and make sure the chocolate melts as you stir it in.
  2. Stir the roughly broken Oreo biscuits through the mixture.
  3. Line a dish with baking paper and scrape your mixture into it.
  4. Leave it in the fridge to set. Take it out and cut into blocks.
